contaplex.name: ContaPlex
contaplex.hero: Your SMB accounting, tidy and up to date with SUNAT
contaplex.heroDesc: Automate entries, generate valid electronic books and file your reports without touching a spreadsheet. ContaPlex does the heavy lifting; you decide.

features.title: Income/expense automation
features.desc: Automatic bank reconciliation with Peruvian banks.

features.title: Real-time reports
features.desc: Financial KPIs updated to the second.

features.title: SUNAT integration
features.desc: SIRE, RCE and RVIE — one-click submissions and validations.

features.title: Electronic books
features.desc: Purchases, Sales, Cash, Journal and Ledger ready.

features.title: PLE validation
features.desc: Review and fix before filing with SUNAT.

features.title: Financial statements
features.desc: Balance, P&L and cash flow automated.

features.title: Profitability analysis
features.desc: By cost center, line or project.

features.title: Bank-grade encryption
features.desc: Your data protected with AES-256 encryption.

contaplex.plansTitulo: Pick the ContaPlex plan that fits
contaplex.plansDesc: All plans include unlimited users, parametrization and updates.

plans.name: Standard
features: Accounting books (Purchases, Sales, Cash, Journal, Ledger, Balance)

plans.name: Business
plans.desc: PLE validation, opening balances, advanced queries

plans.name: Gold
plans.desc: Fixed assets, withholdings, complete financial statements

faq.q: Is ContaPlex authorized by SUNAT?
faq.a: Yes. ContaPlex complies with all SUNAT specifications for electronic books, SIRE, RCE and RVIE. It's on the official approved software list.

faq.q: Can I migrate my data from another system?
faq.a: Yes. Our team handles the migration: balances, historical records, chart of accounts and configuration. No extra cost on Business and Gold.

faq.q: Does it include training for my team?
faq.a: Always. Every implementation includes 3 live training sessions with your accountant and admin staff, plus unlimited access to DGD Academy online.

faq.q: What if SUNAT issues new rules?
faq.a: Codeplex updates the system automatically. You don't have to do anything — updates are deployed in the cloud without disrupting operations.

faq.q: How do you protect my accounting data?
faq.a: AWS servers in Peru/Brazil region, AES-256 encryption in transit and at rest, automatic backups every 6 hours with 90-day retention.

faq.q: Do you run automatic backups?
faq.a: Yes. Backups every 6 hours with 90-day retention. You can download your backups anytime from your panel.

faq.q: How are updates billed?
faq.a: Included. All ContaPlex updates, including regulatory changes and new features, are covered by your monthly plan.

faq.q: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.a: Yes, no fine print. Cancel with 30 days' notice and export all your data in standard formats (Excel, XML, PDF).

cta.descripcion: Implementation, migration and training included. We walk with you every step.

gestionplex.name: GestiónPlex
gestionplex.hero: Your entire operation, from warehouse to checkout
gestionplex.heroDesc: Inventory, purchases, sales, production and restaurant on a single platform. From the manager's laptop to the salesperson's phone.

features.title: Multi-warehouse inventory
features.desc: Real-time stock per warehouse and branch.

features.title: Warehouses and branches
features.desc: Control locations, bins and transfers.

features.title: Real-time shipments
features.desc: Electronic delivery notes and tracking.

features.title: Purchases, sales, transfers
features.desc: Orders, receipts and integrated movements.

features.title: Salespeople
features.desc: Targets, commissions and assigned routes.

features.title: Bulk import
features.desc: Upload your catalog from Excel in minutes.

features.title: Restaurant module
features.desc: Rooms, tables, kitchen and delivery integrated.

features.title: Treasury and cash
features.desc: Cash counts, flow and reconciliation.

features.title: Production
features.desc: Recipes, production orders and costing.

features.title: Mobile app
features.desc: iOS and Android for salespeople and supervisors.

gestionplex.plansTitulo: Pick the GestiónPlex plan that fits

faq.q: Does it work for restaurants with multiple rooms?
faq.a: Yes. GestiónPlex supports multiple rooms, table maps, kitchen dispatch per station and integrated delivery.

faq.q: Can I use the POS offline?
faq.a: The POS has offline sales mode. It syncs automatically when connection is restored.

faq.q: How many users can I have?
faq.a: All plans include unlimited users. You only pay for active warehouses.

faq.q: Does it handle series and batches?
faq.a: Yes, GestiónPlex handles series, batches, expiration dates and full traceability.

faq.q: Does it integrate with my ContaPlex?
faq.a: Native integration. Sales generate accounting entries automatically.

faq.q: Does it work with barcodes?
faq.a: Yes, USB, Bluetooth and mobile-app-integrated readers.

faq.q: Do you handle migration from my current system?
faq.a: Yes. Catalog, initial stock, customers and suppliers migrated at no cost on Premium and Gold.

faq.q: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.a: Yes, with 30 days' notice. We export all your data in Excel.

facturacion-sunat.name: SUNAT Invoicing
facturacion-sunat.tagline: Valid receipts, invoices and delivery notes
facturacion-sunat.heroDesc: Issue, send and archive valid receipts, invoices and delivery notes. Digital certificate included and automatic client delivery by email or WhatsApp.

features.title: Receipts and invoices
features.desc: Electronic, valid with SUNAT instantly.

features.title: Delivery notes
features.desc: Electronic, with tracking and auto-validation.

features.title: Credit and debit notes
features.desc: Guided issuance and corrections.

features.title: Automatic SUNAT submission
features.desc: XML, PDF and CDR sent in seconds.

features.title: Digital certificate included
features.desc: No extra paperwork — we handle it for you.

features.title: Client distribution
features.desc: Email and WhatsApp with XML, PDF and CDR.

features.title: Integrates with your stack
features.desc: ContaPlex, GestiónPlex or your ERP via API.

features.title: Reports and reconciliation
features.desc: Your whole sales book in real time.

facturacion-sunat.plansTitulo: Pick the Invoicing plan that fits
facturacion-sunat.plansDesc: Digital certificate included · unlimited users · updates.

plans.name: Gold
plans.desc: All in, full sales and support

faq.q: How does the digital certificate work?
faq.a: We handle it for you with an authorized certification entity. It's included in all plans at no additional cost.

faq.q: What happens if SUNAT rejects a receipt?
faq.a: The system notifies you immediately with the reason and guides you to fix and resend.

faq.q: Can I send by WhatsApp?
faq.a: Yes. Every issuance can trigger an automatic email and WhatsApp to the client with XML, PDF and CDR.

faq.q: Does it integrate with my ERP?
faq.a: We have a full REST API. Also native integration with ContaPlex and GestiónPlex.

faq.q: Does it store receipts for 5 years?
faq.a: Yes. Permanent storage of XML, PDF and CDR meeting tax requirements.

faq.q: Do you have a high-volume plan?
faq.a: Gold supports bulk issuance without limit. For special cases (over 500k/month) we offer enterprise plans.

faq.q: Can I issue from mobile?
faq.a: Yes, the mobile app allows issuance, lookup and resending from iOS and Android.

faq.q: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.a: Yes, with 30 days' notice. We export all your historical receipts.

cta.titulo: Ready to start with SUNAT Invoicing?
cta.descripcion: Implementation, digital certificate and training included.
